entry.title: v0.15.0 – PVP Systems and Status Immunities [Shinobi]
entry.summary: Shinobi Fan of Knives now lands at cursor position (like Stomp)

entry.title: v0.13.0 – Shinobi Revamp [Shinobi]
entry.summary: Shinobi: 7 new skills; Shinobi: new skill modifiers distributed to existing Kunais; Shinobi: removed −50% MP cost per active clone; clone skill casts now cost caster's mana; Shinobi: Releases now convert weapon element; Shinobi: overall Clone behaviour improved
